'''√dh-th-z''' ('''dhathaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cupboard|cupboard]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-th-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cupboard|cupboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √dh-th-z
|-
! Lemma
| dhathaza
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || dhathazithi || dhathaziji || dhathazishi || dhathazi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || dhathazuthuth || dhathazujuj || dhathazushush || dhathaz
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || dhathazuthu || dhathazuju || dhathazushu || dhathazu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || dhathazufuth || dhathazufuj || dhathazufush || dhathazuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || dhathazethe || dhathazeje || dhathazeshe || dhathaze
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || dhathazothoth || dhathazojoj || dhathazoshosh || dhathaz
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || dhathazotho || dhathazojo || dhathazosho || dhathazo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || dhathazofoth || dhathazofoj || dhathazofosh || dhathazof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dhathazïf || dhathazïf || dhathazïf || dhathazïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dhathazïfïf || dhathazïfïf || dhathazïfïf || dhathazïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dhathazïf || dhathazïf || dhathazïf || dhathazïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dhathazïf || dhathazïf || dhathazïf || dhathazïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || dhathazæthæ || dhathazæjæ || dhathazæshæ || dhathazæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || dhathazathath || dhathazajaj || dhathazashash || dhathaz
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || dhathazatha || dhathazaja || dhathazasha || dhathaza
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || dhathazafath || dhathazafaj || dhathazafash || dhathazaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || dhathazasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || godhathazasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokidhathazasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || dhathaznüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || godhathaznknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokidhathaznüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || dhathazshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || godhathaznkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokidhathazshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || dhathazroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || godhathaznkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokidhathazroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || dhathazmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || godhathaznkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokidhathazmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || dhathazsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || godhathaznksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokidhathazsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || dhathazngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || godhathaznkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokidhathazngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || dhathazyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || godhathaznkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokidhathazyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || dhathazyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || godhathaznkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokidhathazyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || dhathaznüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || godhathaznknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokidhathaznüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || dhathaznüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || godhathaznknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidhathaznüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || dhathaznümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || godhathaznknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokidhathaznümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || dhathazshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || godhathaznkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokidhathazshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || dhathazshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || godhathaznkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidhathazshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || dhathazshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || godhathaznkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokidhathazshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || dhathazronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || godhathaznkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokidhathazronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || dhathazroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || godhathaznkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokidhathazroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || dhathazromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || godhathaznkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokidhathazromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || dhathazmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || godhathaznkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokidhathazmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || dhathazmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || godhathaznkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokidhathazmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || dhathazmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || godhathaznkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokidhathazmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || dhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || dhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hodhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hodhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohodhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohodhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüdhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüdhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüdhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüdhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïdhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïdhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïdhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïdhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || ludhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || ludhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || luludhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || luludhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lidhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lidhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilidhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilidhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kodhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kodhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokodhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokodhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kedhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kedhæthæz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekedhathaz
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekedhæthæz
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
